docs.text:
Grain | The AI Notetaker Built for Growing Teams
300+ reviews
250+ testimonials
The AI notetaker for 
agents
 and teams
Grain captures and enriches your meetings, then delivers them to Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI tool so your agents can do the work. Start recording in minutes.
Get started - free forever
Book my demo
Free forever
Bots optional
No credit card required
Works with:
Want help onboarding your team?
Top teams use Grain to power their AI
SOC 2 audited
GDPR compliant
Everything your AI agents and team need from meetings
Grain is free to use, simple to set up, and cost-effective for your entire company.
Universal capture
Capture every meeting, everywhere.
Context for AI
Enrich your transcripts with the full picture, not just raw text.
AI agent integrations
Power your agents to do the work after the meeting.
Team collaboration
Accelerate team learning and alignment.
Universal capture
Capture your meetings, on any platform, with or without a bot
Bot-less transcription
Grain transcribes your computer's audio without meeting bots joining your call.
Video recording with bots
Get video recordings with the Grain bot in the meeting even when you can't attend.
Capture rules
Type notes, tag important moments, or clip segments to perfect your insights during your meeting.
Bot-less transcription
Grain transcribes your computer's audio without meeting bots joining your call.
Video recording with bots
Get video recordings with the Grain bot in the meeting even when you can't attend.
Capture rules
Set rules for which meetings get recorded, so everything you want is captured without thinking about it.
Context for AI
Give your agents the full picture behind every meeting
Enriched transcripts
Transcripts with participant and cross-meeting context. Available in 100+ languages in clean Markdown.
Your notes, in the context
Add notes, clips, and action items during meetings that sync to the transcript and flow to your AI agents.
Action-items & AI notes
Action items and meeting summaries for every meeting shareable from Grain or sent straight to your inbox.
Enriched transcripts
Transcripts with participant and cross-meeting context. Available in 100+ languages in clean Markdown.
Your notes, in the context
Add notes, flags, and action items during meetings that sync to the transcript and flow to your AI agents.
Action-items & AI notes
Action items and meeting summaries for every meeting shareable from Grain or sent straight to your inbox.
AI agent integrations
Put your meeting data to work in Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI tool
One-click AI export
Bulk download enriched Markdown transcripts or open them directly in Claude or ChatGPT.
MCP Server & API
Let your AI agents query transcripts, search across meetings, and access your full meeting history.
Ask anything inside Grain
Ask questions across your entire meeting library and get answers with precise citations in Grain.
One-click AI export
Bulk download enriched Markdown transcripts or open them directly in Claude or ChatGPT.
MCP Server & API
Let your AI agents query transcripts, search across meetings, and access your full meeting history.
Ask anything inside Grain
Ask questions across your entire meeting library and get answers with precise citations in Grain.
Team collaboration
Keep your whole team in sync, automatically
Sharing
Share clips, projects, and full meeting recordings with teammates and clients so everyone can stay in sync.
Teams
Create teams for automatic group sharing. Only the right people get access automatically.
CRM sync
Sync notes and properties to HubSpot or Salesforce contacts and deals so your reps can skip the data entry.
Sharing
Share clips, projects, and full meeting recordings with teammates and clients so everyone can stay in sync.
Teams
Create teams for automatic group sharing. Only the right people get access automatically.
CRM sync
Sync notes and properties to HubSpot or Salesforce contacts and deals so your reps can skip the data entry.
Grain integrations + AI destinations
Integrations with Claude, ChatGPT, Slack, HubSpot, Zapier, API and more make it effortless to get your meeting data wherever you need it.
Explore Integrations

Capture every meeting. Enrich your transcripts. Feed your AI.

llm_raw.description: An AI-powered meeting recording and transcription platform that integrates with AI agents to automate notes, action items, and data sync.
llm_raw.notes: Explicitly mentions an 'MCP Server & API' in the provided documentation, indicating high readiness for agentic integration.
